name: United Rentals, Inc.
description: United Rentals, Inc. is the largest equipment rental company in the world, operating an extensive network of service locations across North America, Europe, Australia, and New Zealand. The company serves a diverse customer base including construction and industrial firms, utilities, municipalities, and homeowners. It offers approximately 4,800 classes of equipment for rent, ranging from general construction and industrial tools to specialized solutions for fluid solutions, power and HVAC, and trench safety. United Rentals focuses on delivering integrated solutions that help customers improve productivity and safety on their jobsites.

investment_theses.company_type: Equipment Rental / Support for US Factory Construction
